expected.clarification: Ask whether Dale Clinic or Harbor Clinic should be used as the clinic for “Follow-up Laboratory Visit.”
response_constraints: Ask one concise question that names the two offered locations: Dale Clinic and Harbor Clinic.
Do not retrieve the saved preference, invent a third choice, create anything, or claim the request is complete.

prompt: Please create the appointment “Post-treatment Laboratory Review” for 2026-10-14. It could be assigned to Dale Clinic or Harbor Clinic, and I have not chosen between them. The clinic matters, so do not guess or use my saved default.
